lastMatchPlayed.notes: Returned to club action late in the QSL season

injuryUpdates.notes: Described as 'fit-again' on preliminary squad release. All-time top scorer for Qatar; top scorer in AFC qualifying (12 goals). Available for the tournament.

squadChanges.details: Surprise inclusion in 34-man preliminary squad at age 42; veteran forward with 124 caps and 39 international goals recalled for tournament preparation.
Former Aston Villa defender included in the 34-man preliminary squad as Lopetegui broadens defensive options.
19-year-old youngest squad member included in preliminary 34-man list, signalling generational refresh alongside the veteran core.
QFA Best Under-23 Player named in 34-man preliminary squad.
Al Arabi goalkeeper omitted from preliminary 34-man list despite being in the March training camp.
Al Rayyan forward omitted from preliminary 34-man list despite being in the March training camp.

bettingOddsUpdate.toQualifyFromGroup: 25/1 (to win Group B); approx 2/1 to reach the Last 32 in expanded format
bettingOddsUpdate.source: Freebets.com aggregator citing Bet365, Betway, Coral, Ladbrokes, Betfred (2026-04-29)
bettingOddsUpdate.notes: Qatar are rated longest-priced side in Group B. Group-stage exit is the bookmakers' most likely outcome at 1/2; Switzerland is heavy group favourite. Expanded 48-team knockout keeps qualification mathematically in play.

summary: The big update is Qatar's 34-man preliminary squad announced 12 May 2026, which features the expected core (Afif, Al-Haydos, Almoez Ali, Pedro Miguel) plus surprise 42-year-old recall Sebastian Soria, former Aston Villa defender Niall Mason, and youth pair Tahsin Jamshid (19) and Ayoub Al Oui. Almoez Ali is flagged as 'fit-again' after a minor knock, so the star front line is intact. No matches have been played in the 16 Apr - 16 May window (March friendlies vs Serbia and Argentina were cancelled due to regional airspace disruption); friendlies vs Republic of Ireland (28 May, Dublin) and El Salvador (6 Jun, Los Angeles) are next on the calendar before the squad is trimmed to 23-26 by the 1 June deadline.
